title: Timeless Adventures
description: Timeless Adventures is a All The Mods type modpack based around the Tardis, and Doctor Who -for fabric-
body:
**All of Time and Space, everything that ever happened or ever will - where do you want to start?**
Timeless adventures is a minecraft modpack similar to All The Mods, only on fabric. It adds lots of features by having many different mods. This modpack is made for higher end PCs and Laptops, but do try it out and see if it works for you :)
### what does it add?
it adds many features from quality of life improvements to new dimensions and of course the TARDIS. It brings new biomes, mobs, structures to your world. Many optimisation mods are added to prevent crashes and let the world load smother and easier.
### Why would i choose this modpack over others?
I've been trying to find a big modpack for fabric but i found only a few. So i've decided to make one myself. I hope you like it as i know other people are trying to find a good modpack for fabric. There are not many to choose from.
### Recommended:
- 8gb of Ram; if it doesn't work add more :)
- turn off Vsync
- NOT recommended to use shaders (unless if you have a good PC)

### Updates
The modpack will be updated from time to time. That could be because of mod updates or incompatability. If you want to be the first to hear about updates join my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/2ZSVcuT3a5)! Also Subscribe to my [Youtube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@phoenixman1000).
